function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, and used 40_projects canonical README plus folder-date convention.
function.outcome_justification: 40_projects/AGENTS.MD states project folders use a YYYY_MM_DD creation-date prefix. The evening hobby project corresponds to Black Library Evenings (canonical README at 40_projects/2026_04_03_black_library_evenings/README.MD), so its start date is 2026_04_03.
